final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media cover image for a Xiaohongshu (小红书) creator post.

Style/medium: needs a "素人" (amateur creator) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 9-grid layout
Subject: must include DJI Pocket 4 as the featured product
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" (centered, large title), font style needs to be cute and differentiated
Constraints: must preserve the 9-grid structure, must preserve amateur creator aesthetic
Avoid:
